text.title: Architecture Health Weekly Report Template Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 4-step procedure to apply Architecture Health Weekly Report Template. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: pull-churn
step.action: Compute hot-spot files (top decile churn × top decile incident).
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: update-debt-delta
step.input: Prior week debt entries, current refactor merges
step.action: Compute paid-down vs new debt deltas.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: review-risk-register
step.action: Promote / demote / close risks; surface one decision needed.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: draft-report
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
